faqs.question: How long does it take to develop an application?
faqs.answer: The timeline depends on project complexity. A first version can be delivered within a few weeks and improved progressively.

faqs.question: Can you build an application like Uber, Airbnb, or Glovo?
faqs.answer: Yes. Revival builds solutions inspired by major platforms, adapted to African realities, with modern and scalable features.

faqs.question: Do you provide support after launch?
faqs.answer: Yes. Revival provides ongoing support, including maintenance, updates, performance improvements, and strategic guidance.

faqs.question: How can I start with Revival?
faqs.answer: Contact us through the website or official channels. Our team will review your need and propose a suitable solution.

faqs.question: Does Revival only work in the DRC?
faqs.answer: No. Although we are strongly rooted in the Democratic Republic of Congo, our services are available across Africa and internationally.

faqs.question: Are my data and project secure?
faqs.answer: Yes. Revival gives strong importance to security and confidentiality, following modern standards.

faqs.question: Can I collaborate with Revival as a partner?
faqs.answer: Yes. Revival offers several commercial, technical, and strategic partnership models.

faqs.question: Can I pay with Mobile Money?
faqs.answer: Yes. Revival supports payment solutions adapted to the African context, including Mobile Money.

faqs.question: Can Revival help me grow my existing business?
faqs.answer: Yes. We help existing businesses improve performance, attract more customers, and automate operations.

faqs.question: What if I do not yet have a clear idea?
faqs.answer: That is not a problem. Revival helps you structure your idea and identify opportunities.

reviews.content: Revival transformed our HR management. The application is intuitive, fast, and reduced our administrative workload by 65%.
Our online store saw conversions increase by 120% after the redesign. The team is responsive and professional.
Revival’s analytics dashboard gives us real-time visibility into our KPIs. Essential for decision-making.

job_offers.title: Senior Full-Stack Developer
job_offers.description: Nous recherchons un developpeur Full-Stack Senior maitrisant Laravel, React et MySQL pour rejoindre notre equipe produit.

job_offers.title: Front-End React/Next.js Developer
job_offers.description: Rejoignez notre equipe front-end pour construire des interfaces utilisateur modernes et performantes avec React et Next.js.

job_offers.title: Back-End Laravel Developer
job_offers.description: Nous cherchons un developpeur Back-End experimente en PHP/Laravel pour concevoir et maintenir nos APIs REST.

job_offers.title: Senior UI/UX Designer
job_offers.description: Nous recherchons un UI/UX Designer Senior pour concevoir des experiences utilisateur exceptionnelles sur Figma.

job_offers.title: DevOps / Cloud Engineer
job_offers.description: Rejoignez notre equipe infrastructure pour gerer et optimiser nos environnements cloud AWS avec Docker et Kubernetes.

job_offers.title: Business Developer
job_offers.description: Nous cherchons un Business Developer dynamique pour developper notre portefeuille clients et nos partenariats strategiques.

job_offers.title: React Native Mobile Developer
job_offers.description: Nous recherchons un developpeur Mobile React Native pour concevoir et developper nos applications iOS et Android.

partnership_types.name: Commercial partner (reseller)
partnership_types.description: Resell Revival solutions in a specific region or market.

partnership_types.name: Technical / integration partner
partnership_types.description: Collaborate on API integrations, SDKs, plugins, or white-label solutions.

partnership_types.name: Strategic partner
partnership_types.description: Co-develop products, open new markets, or build a strong alliance.

partnership_types.name: Startup / innovation partner
partnership_types.description: Support or co-build innovative solutions with startups.

partnership_types.name: Other
partnership_types.description: Suggest a specific partnership model to review with the Revival team.
